_**Agent (gpt-5.2-codex)**_


修改应用名称和图标的方法：

- 应用名称：在 `design\src\main\res\values\strings.xml` 中修改 `application_name_meta` 和 `application_name_alpha`。
- 应用图标：替换 `app\src\main\res\mipmap-*` 目录下的 `ic_launcher.png` 和 `ic_launcher_round.png`（各尺寸），并更新 `mipmap-anydpi-v26` 中的适配器文件。

_**Agent (gpt-5.2-codex)**_


修改方法如下：

## 修改应用名称

修改 `design\src\main\res\values\strings.xml` 中的以下字符串：

- `application_name_meta`：正式版名称（当前为 "Clash Meta for Android"）
- `application_name_alpha`：Alpha 版名称（当前为 "Clash Meta for Android Alpha"）

如需修改中文名称，可同时修改 `design\src\main\res\values-zh\strings.xml` 等语言文件。

## 修改应用图标

有两种方式：

### 方式 1：替换 PNG 图标文件（推荐）

替换以下目录中的图标文件：
- `app\src\main\res\mipmap-hdpi\` - ic_launcher.png 和 ic_launcher_round.png
- `app\src\main\res\mipmap-mdpi\` - ic_launcher.png 和 ic_launcher_round.png
- `app\src\main\res\mipmap-xhdpi\` - ic_launcher.png 和 ic_launcher_round.png
- `app\src\main\res\mipmap-xxhdpi\` - ic_launcher.png 和 ic_launcher_round.png
- `app\src\main\res\mipmap-xxxhdpi\` - ic_launcher.png 和 ic_launcher_round.png

### 方式 2：修改 Adaptive Icon（Android 8.0+）

修改以下文件：
- `app\src\main\res\drawable\ic_launcher_foreground.xml` - 前景图标
- `app\src\main\res\values\ic_launcher_background.xml` - 背景颜色

需要我帮你修改吗？请提供：
1. 新的应用名称
2. 新图标文件路径（或说明使用方式 2）

val config = install(ConfigurationModule(self))\n        val network = install(NetworkObserveModule(self))\n\n        if (store.dynamicNotification)\n            install(DynamicNotificationModule(self))\n        else\n            install(StaticNotificationModule(self))\n\n        install(AppListCacheModule(self))\n        install(TimeZoneModule(self))\n        install(SuspendModule(self))\n        install(HealthCheckNotificationModule(self))\n\n        try {\n            while (isActive) {\n                val quit = select\u003cBoolean\u003e {\n                    close.onEvent {\n                        true\n                    }\n                    config.onEvent {\n                        reason = it.message\n\n                        true\n                    }\n                    network.onEvent {\n                        false\n                    }\n                }\n\n                if (quit) break\n            }\n        } catch (e: Exception) {\n            Log.e(\"Create clash runtime: ${e.message}\", e)\n\n            reason = e.message\n        } finally {\n            withContext(NonCancellable) {\n                stopSelf()\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onCreate() {\n        super.onCreate()\n\n        if (StatusProvider.serviceRunning)\n            return stopSelf()\n\n        StatusProvider.serviceRunning = true\n\n        StaticNotificationModule.createNotificationChannel(this)\n        StaticNotificationModule.notifyLoadingNotification(this)\n        HealthCheckNotificationModule.createNotificationChannel(this)\n\n        runtime.launch()\n    }\n\n    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {\n StatusProvider.serviceRunning = false\n\n        sendClashStopped(reason)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "            )\n        )\n\n    override suspend fun run() {\n        val loaded = receiveBroadcast(capacity = Channel.CONFLATED) {\n            addAction(Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_LOADED)\n        }\n\n        while (true) {\n            loaded.receive()\n\n            val profileName = StatusProvider.currentProfile ?: \"Not selected\"\n\n            val notification = builder\n                .setContentTitle(profileName)\n                .setContentText(service.getText(R.string.running))\n                .build()\n\n            service.startForegroundCompat(R.id.nf_clash_status, notification)\n        }\n    }\n\n    companion object {\n        const val CHANNEL_ID = \"clash_status_channel\"\n\n        fun createNotificationChannel(service: Service) {\n            NotificationManagerCompat.from(service).createNotificationChannel(\n                NotificationChannelCompat.Builder(\n                    CHANNEL_ID,\n                    NotificationManagerCompat.IMPORTANCE_LOW\n                ).setName(service.getText(R.string.clash_service_status_channel)).build()\n            )\n        }\n\n        fun notifyLoadingNotification(service: Service) {\n            val notification =\n                NotificationCompat.Builder(service, CHANNEL_ID)\n                    .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n                    .setOngoing(true)\n                    .setColor(service.getColorCompat(R.color.color_clash))\n                    .setOnlyAlertOnce(true)\n                    .setShowWhen(false)\n                    .setContentTitle(service.getText(R.string.loading))\n                    .build()\n\n            service.startForegroundCompat(R.id.nf_clash_status, notification)\n        }\n    }\n}",

android.content.IntentFilter\nimport android.graphics.drawable.Icon\nimport android.os.Build\nimport android.service.quicksettings.Tile\nimport android.service.quicksettings.TileService\nimport androidx.annotation.RequiresApi\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.registerReceiverCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.constants.Intents\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.constants.Permissions\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.remote.StatusClient\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.util.startClashService\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.util.stopClashService\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.R\n\n@RequiresApi(Build.VERSION_CODES.N)\nclass TileService : TileService() {\n    private var currentProfile = \"\"\n    private var clashRunning = false\n\n    override fun onClick() {\n        val tile = qsTile ?: return\n\n        when (tile.state) {\n            Tile.STATE_INACTIVE -\u003e {\n                startClashService()\n            }\n            Tile.STATE_ACTIVE -\u003e {\n                stopClashService()\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onStartListening() {\n        super.onStartListening()\n\n        registerReceiverCompat(\n            receiver,\n            IntentFilter().apply {\n                addAction(Intents.ACTION_CLASH_STARTED)\n                addAction(Intents.ACTION_CLASH_STOPPED)\n                addAction(Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_LOADED)\n                addAction(Intents.ACTION_SERVICE_RECREATED)\n            },\n            Permissions.RECEIVE_SELF_BROADCASTS,\n            null\n        )\n\n        val name = StatusClient(this).currentProfile()\n\n        clashRunning = name != null\n        currentProfile = name ?: \"\"\n\n        updateTile()\n    }\n\n    override fun onStopListening() {\n        super.onStopListening()\n\n        unregisterReceiver(receiver)\n    }\n\n    private fun updateTile() {\n        val tile = qsTile ?: return",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    private fun updateTile() {\n        val tile = qsTile ?: return\n\n        tile.state = if (clashRunning)\n            Tile.STATE_ACTIVE\n        else\n            Tile.STATE_INACTIVE\n\n        tile.label = if (currentProfile.isEmpty())\n            getText(R.string.launch_name)\n        else\n            currentProfile\n\n        tile.icon = Icon.createWithResource(this, R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n\n        tile.updateTile()\n    }\n\n    private val receiver = object : BroadcastReceiver() {\n        override fun onReceive(context: Context?, intent: Intent?) {\n            when (intent?.action) {\n                Intents.ACTION_CLASH_STARTED -\u003e {\n                    clashRunning = true\n\n                    currentProfile = \"\"\n                }\n                Intents.ACTION_CLASH_STOPPED, Intents.ACTION_SERVICE_RECREATED -\u003e {\n                    clashRunning = false\n\n                    currentProfile = \"\"\n                }\n                Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_LOADED -\u003e {\n                    currentProfile = StatusClient(this@TileService).currentProfile() ?: \"\"\n                }\n            }\n\n            updateTile()\n        }\n    }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    override suspend fun run() = coroutineScope {\n        val events = Channel\u003cString\u003e(Channel.UNLIMITED)\n        \n        // Register callback\n        Bridge.nativeSubscribeHealthCheck(object : HealthCheckCallback {\n            override fun onHealthCheckTriggered(groupName: String) {\n                events.trySend(groupName)\n            }\n        })\n        \n        while (true) {\n            select\u003cUnit\u003e {\n                events.onReceive { groupName -\u003e\n                    showNotification(groupName)\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    private fun showNotification(groupName: String) {\n        val notification = NotificationCompat.Builder(service, CHANNEL_ID)\n            .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n            .setColor(service.getColorCompat(R.color.color_clash))\n            .setContentTitle(service.getString(R.string.health_check_triggered_title))\n            .setContentText(service.getString(R.string.health_check_triggered_message, groupName))\n            .setStyle(NotificationCompat.BigTextStyle()\n                .bigText(service.getString(R.string.health_check_triggered_message, groupName)))\n            .setAutoCancel(true)\n            .setContentIntent(\n                PendingIntent.getActivity(\n                    service,\n                    NOTIFICATION_ID,\n                    Intent().setComponent(Components.MAIN_ACTIVITY)\n                        .setFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP),\n                    pendingIntentFlags(PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT)\n                )\n            )\n            .build()\n        \n        notificationManager.notify(NOTIFICATION_ID, notification)\n    }\n}",

        "contents": "    private fun createChannels() {\n        NotificationManagerCompat.from(this).createNotificationChannelsCompat(\n            listOf(\n                NotificationChannelCompat.Builder(\n                    SERVICE_CHANNEL,\n                    NotificationManagerCompat.IMPORTANCE_LOW\n                ).setName(getString(R.string.profile_service_status)).build(),\n                NotificationChannelCompat.Builder(\n                    STATUS_CHANNEL,\n                    NotificationManagerCompat.IMPORTANCE_LOW\n                ).setName(getString(R.string.profile_process_status)).build(),\n                NotificationChannelCompat.Builder(\n                    RESULT_CHANNEL,\n                    NotificationManagerCompat.IMPORTANCE_DEFAULT\n                ).setName(getString(R.string.profile_process_result)).build()\n            )\n        )\n    }\n\n    private fun foreground() {\n        val notification = NotificationCompat.Builder(this, SERVICE_CHANNEL)\n            .setContentTitle(getString(R.string.profile_updater))\n            .setContentText(getString(R.string.running))\n            .setColor(getColorCompat(R.color.color_clash))\n            .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n            .setOngoing(true)\n            .setOnlyAlertOnce(true)\n            .build()\n\n        startForegroundCompat(R.id.nf_profile_worker, notification)\n    }\n\n    private suspend inline fun processing(name: String, block: () -\u003e Unit) {\n        val id = UndefinedIds.next()\n\n        val notification = NotificationCompat.Builder(this, STATUS_CHANNEL)\n            ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.service.store\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.store.Store\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.store.asStoreProvider\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.PreferenceProvider\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.model.AccessControlMode\nimport java.util.*\n\nclass ServiceStore(context: Context) {\n    private val store = Store(\n        PreferenceProvider\n            .createSharedPreferencesFromContext(context)\n            .asStoreProvider()\n    )\n\n    var activeProfile: UUID? by store.typedString(\n        key = \"active_profile\",\n        from = { if (it.isBlank()) null else UUID.fromString(it) },\n        to = { it?.toString() ?: \"\" }\n    )\n\n    var bypassPrivateNetwork: Boolean by store.boolean(\n        key = \"bypass_private_network\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var accessControlMode: AccessControlMode by store.enum(\n        key = \"access_control_mode\",\n        defaultValue = AccessControlMode.AcceptAll,\n        values = AccessControlMode.values()\n    )\n\n    var accessControlPackages by store.stringSet(\n        key = \"access_control_packages\",\n        defaultValue = emptySet()\n    )\n\n    var dnsHijacking by store.boolean(\n        key = \"dns_hijacking\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var systemProxy by store.boolean(\n        key = \"system_proxy\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var allowBypass by store.boolean(\n        key = \"allow_bypass\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var allowIpv6 by store.boolean(\n        key = \"allow_ipv6\",\n        defaultValue = false\n    )\n\n    var tunStackMode by store.string(\n        key = \"tun_stack_mode\",\n        defaultValue = \"system\"\n    )\n\n    var dynamicNotification by store.boolean(\n        key = \"dynamic_notification\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class TunService : VpnService(), CoroutineScope by CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.Default) {\n    private val self: TunService\n        get() = this\n\n    private var reason: String? = null\n\n    private val runtime = clashRuntime {\n        val store = ServiceStore(self)\n\n        val close = install(CloseModule(self))\n        val tun = install(TunModule(self))\n        val config = install(ConfigurationModule(self))\n        val network = install(NetworkObserveModule(self))\n\n        if (store.dynamicNotification)\n            install(DynamicNotificationModule(self))\n        else\n            install(StaticNotificationModule(self))\n\n        install(AppListCacheModule(self))\n        install(TimeZoneModule(self))\n        install(SuspendModule(self))\n        install(HealthCheckNotificationModule(self))\n\n        try {\n            tun.open()\n\n            while (isActive) {\n                val quit = select\u003cBoolean\u003e {\n                    close.onEvent {\n                        true\n                    }\n                    config.onEvent {\n                        reason = it.message\n\n                        true\n                    }\n                    network.onEvent { n -\u003e\n                        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT in 22..28) @TargetApi(22) {\n                            setUnderlyingNetworks(n?.let { arrayOf(it) })\n                        }\n\n                        false\n                    }\n                }\n\n                if (quit) break\n            }\n        } catch (e: Exception) {\n            Log.e(\"Create clash runtime: ${e.message}\", e)\n\n            reason = e.message\n        } finally {\n            withContext(NonCancellable) {\n                tun.close()\n\n                stopSelf()\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onCreate() {\n        super.onCreate()",
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "    }\n\n    override suspend fun run() = coroutineScope {\n        var shouldUpdate = service.getSystemService\u003cPowerManager\u003e()?.isInteractive ?: true\n\n        val screenToggle = receiveBroadcast(false, Channel.CONFLATED) {\n            addAction(Intent.ACTION_SCREEN_ON)\n            addAction(Intent.ACTION_SCREEN_OFF)\n        }\n\n        val profileLoaded = receiveBroadcast(capacity = Channel.CONFLATED) {\n            addAction(Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_LOADED)\n        }\n\n        val ticker = ticker(TimeUnit.SECONDS.toMillis(1))\n\n        while (true) {\n            select\u003cUnit\u003e {\n                screenToggle.onReceive {\n                    when (it.action) {\n                        Intent.ACTION_SCREEN_ON -\u003e\n                            shouldUpdate = true\n                        Intent.ACTION_SCREEN_OFF -\u003e\n                            shouldUpdate = false\n                    }\n                }\n                profileLoaded.onReceive {\n                    builder.setContentTitle(StatusProvider.currentProfile ?: \"Not selected\")\n                }\n                if (shouldUpdate) {\n                    ticker.onReceive {\n                        update()\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}",

        "contents": "    }\n\n    private suspend inline fun processing(name: String, block: () -\u003e Unit) {\n        val id = UndefinedIds.next()\n\n        val notification = NotificationCompat.Builder(this, STATUS_CHANNEL)\n            .setContentTitle(getString(R.string.profile_updating))\n            .setContentText(name)\n            .setColor(getColorCompat(R.color.color_clash))\n            .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n            .setOngoing(true)\n            .setOnlyAlertOnce(true)\n            .setGroup(STATUS_CHANNEL)\n            .build()\n\n        NotificationManagerCompat.from(applicationContext)\n            .notify(id, notification)\n        try {\n            block()\n        } finally {\n            withContext(NonCancellable) {\n                NotificationManagerCompat.from(applicationContext)\n                    .cancel(id)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun resultBuilder(id: Int, uuid: UUID): NotificationCompat.Builder {\n        val intent = PendingIntent.getActivity(\n            this,\n            id,\n            Intent().setComponent(Components.PROPERTIES_ACTIVITY).setUUID(uuid),\n            pendingIntentFlags(PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT)\n        )\n\n        return NotificationCompat.Builder(this, RESULT_CHANNEL)\n            .setColor(getColorCompat(R.color.color_clash))\n            .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n            .setOnlyAlertOnce(true)\n            .setContentIntent(intent)\n            .setAutoCancel(true)\n            .setGroup(RESULT_CHANNEL)\n    }\n\n    private fun completed(uuid: UUID, name: String) {\n        val id = UndefinedIds.next()\n\n        val notification = resultBuilder(id, uuid)\n            .setContentTitle(getString(R.string.update_successfully))\n            .setContentText(getString(R.string.format_update_complete, name))\n            .build()\n\n        NotificationManagerCompat.from(this)\n            .notify(id, notification)\n\n        sendProfileUpdateCompleted(uuid)\n    }\n\n    private fun failed(uuid: UUID, name: String, reason: String) {\n        val id = UndefinedIds.next()\n\n        val content = getString(R.string.format_update_failure, name, reason)",

        "contents": "import java.util.*\n\nclass LogcatService : Service(), CoroutineScope by CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.Default), IInterface {\n    private val cache = LogcatCache()\n\n    private val connection = object : ServiceConnection {\n        override fun onServiceDisconnected(name: ComponentName?) {\n            stopSelf()\n        }\n\n        override fun onServiceConnected(name: ComponentName?, service: IBinder?) {\n            startObserver(service ?: return stopSelf())\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onCreate() {\n        super.onCreate()\n\n        running = true\n\n        createNotificationChannel()\n\n        showNotification()\n\n        bindService(RemoteService::class.intent, connection, Context.BIND_AUTO_CREATE)\n    }\n\n    override fun onDestroy() {\n        cancel()\n\n        unbindService(connection)\n\n        stopForeground(true)\n\n        running = false\n\n        super.onDestroy()\n    }\n\n    override fun onBind(intent: Intent?): IBinder {\n        return this.asBinder()\n    }\n\n    override fun asBinder(): IBinder {\n        return object : Binder() {\n            override fun queryLocalInterface(descriptor: String): IInterface {\n                return this@LogcatService\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun snapshot(full: Boolean): LogcatCache.Snapshot? {\n        return cache.snapshot(full)\n    }\n\n    private fun startObserver(binder: IBinder) {\n        if (!binder.isBinderAlive)\n            return stopSelf()\n\n        ",

        "contents": "    override fun onCreate() {\n        super.onCreate()\n\n        if (StatusProvider.serviceRunning)\n            return stopSelf()\n\n        StatusProvider.serviceRunning = true\n\n        StaticNotificationModule.createNotificationChannel(this)\n        StaticNotificationModule.notifyLoadingNotification(this)\n        HealthCheckNotificationModule.createNotificationChannel(this)\n\n        runtime.launch()\n    }\n\n    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {\n        sendClashStarted()\n\n        return super.onStartCommand(intent, flags, startId)\n    }\n\n    override fun onDestroy() {\n        TunModule.requestStop()\n\n        StatusProvider.serviceRunning = false\n\n        sendClashStopped(reason)\n\n        cancelAndJoinBlocking()\n\n        Log.i(\"TunService destroyed: ${reason ?: \"successfully\"}\")\n\n        super.onDestroy()\n    }\n\n    override fun onTrimMemory(level: Int) {\n        super.onTrimMemory(level)\n\n        runtime.requestGc()\n    }\n\n    private fun TunModule.open() {\n        val store = ServiceStore(self)",

        "contents": "    private fun failed(uuid: UUID, name: String, reason: String) {\n        val id = UndefinedIds.next()\n\n        val content = getString(R.string.format_update_failure, name, reason)\n\n        val notification = resultBuilder(id, uuid)\n            .setContentTitle(getString(R.string.update_failure))\n            .setContentText(content)\n            .setStyle(NotificationCompat.BigTextStyle().bigText(content))\n            .build()\n\n        NotificationManagerCompat.from(this)\n            .notify(id, notification)\n\n        sendProfileUpdateFailed(uuid, reason)\n    }\n\n    companion object {\n        private const val SERVICE_CHANNEL = \"profile_service_channel\"\n        private const val STATUS_CHANNEL = \"profile_status_channel\"\n        private const val RESULT_CHANNEL = \"profile_result_channel\"\n    }\n\n    override fun onBind(intent: Intent?): IBinder {\n        return Binder()\n    }\n}",

_**Agent (gpt-5.2-codex)**_


不是。这是一个 PNG 位图，不是矢量图。

区别：
- PNG：位图，由像素组成，放大后会模糊
- 矢量图（SVG/XML Vector Drawable）：由数学路径描述，可无损缩放

通知图标建议：
- Android 通知图标通常使用矢量图（Vector Drawable），因为：
  1. 系统可能对通知图标着色（单色）
  2. 需要适配不同尺寸和密度
  3. 文件更小

可选方案：
1. 将 PNG 转换为矢量图（Vector Drawable）
2. 直接使用 PNG（需要提供多尺寸版本）

需要我帮您将这个火箭 PNG 转换为矢量图，还是直接使用 PNG？如果使用 PNG，我可以生成通知所需的各尺寸版本。

## 关于 PNG 在 Android 中的使用：

是的，PNG 是 Android 中常用的方法：
1. 兼容性好：所有 Android 版本都支持
2. 简单直接：无需定义路径数据
3. 适合复杂图标：如您的火箭图标
4. 多密度支持：可为不同屏幕密度提供不同尺寸

Android 会自动根据设备密度选择对应的 PNG 文件。代码中仍使用 `R.drawable.ic_logo_service`，系统会自动找到对应密度的 PNG 文件。

重新编译后，通知栏将显示您的火箭图标。

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.model\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.content.Intent\nimport android.graphics.drawable.Drawable\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.getDrawableCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.R\n\nsealed class ProfileProvider {\n    class File(private val context: Context) : ProfileProvider() {\n        override val name: String\n            get() = context.getString(R.string.file)\n        override val summary: String\n            get() = context.getString(R.string.import_from_file)\n        override val icon: Drawable?\n            get() = context.getDrawableCompat(R.drawable.ic_baseline_attach_file)\n\n\n    }\n\n    class Url(private val context: Context) : ProfileProvider() {\n        override val name: String\n            get() = context.getString(R.string.url)\n        override val summary: String\n            get() = context.getString(R.string.import_from_url)\n        override val icon: Drawable?\n            get() = context.getDrawableCompat(R.drawable.ic_baseline_cloud_download)\n    }\n\n    class QR(private val context: Context) : ProfileProvider() {\n        override val name: String\n            get() = context.getString(R.string.qr)\n        override val summary: String\n            get() = context.getString(R.string.import_from_qr)\n        override val icon: Drawable?\n            get() = context.getDrawableCompat(R.drawable.baseline_qr_code_scanner)\n    }\n    class External(\n        override val name: String,\n        override val summary: String,\n        override val icon: Drawable?,\n        val intent: Intent,\n    ) : ProfileProvider()\n\n    abstract val name: String\n    abstract val summary: String\n    abstract val icon: Drawable?\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.util\n\nimport android.content.pm.PackageInfo\nimport android.content.pm.PackageManager\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.foreground\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.AppInfo\n\nfun PackageInfo.toAppInfo(pm: PackageManager): AppInfo {\n    return AppInfo(\n        packageName = packageName,\n        icon = applicationInfo!!.loadIcon(pm).foreground(),\n        label = applicationInfo!!.loadLabel(pm).toString(),\n        installTime = firstInstallTime,\n        updateDate = lastUpdateTime,\n    )\n}",

        "contents": "        return null\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun queryProfileProviders(): List\u003cProfileProvider\u003e {\n        return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\n            val providers = packageManager.queryIntentActivities(\n                Intent(Intents.ACTION_PROVIDE_URL),\n                0\n            ).map {\n                val activity = it.activityInfo\n\n                val name = activity.applicationInfo.loadLabel(packageManager)\n                val summary = activity.loadLabel(packageManager)\n                val icon = activity.loadIcon(packageManager)\n                val intent = Intent(Intents.ACTION_PROVIDE_URL)\n                    .setComponent(\n                        ComponentName(\n                            activity.packageName,\n                            activity.name\n                        )\n                    )\n\n                ProfileProvider.External(name.toString(), summary.toString(), icon, intent)\n            }\n\n            listOf(\n                ProfileProvider.File(self),\n                ProfileProvider.Url(self),\n                ProfileProvider.QR(self)\n            ) + providers\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun scanResultHandler(result: QRResult) {\n        lifecycleScope.launch {\n            when (result) {\n                is QRSuccess -\u003e {\n                    val url = result.content.rawValue\n                        ?: result.content.rawBytes?.let { String(it) }.orEmpty()\n\n                    createProfileByQrCode(url)\n                }\n\n                QRUserCanceled -\u003e {}\n                QRMissingPermission -\u003e design?.showExceptionToast(getString(R.string.import_from_qr_no_permission))\n                is QRError -\u003e design?.showExceptionToast(getString(R.string.import_from_qr_exception))\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun createProfileByQrCode(url: String) {\n        withProfile {\n            launchProperties(\n                ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    private fun updateTile() {\n        val tile = qsTile ?: return\n\n        tile.state = if (clashRunning)\n            Tile.STATE_ACTIVE\n        else\n            Tile.STATE_INACTIVE\n\n        tile.label = if (currentProfile.isEmpty())\n            getText(R.string.launch_name)\n        else\n            currentProfile\n\n        tile.icon = Icon.createWithResource(this, R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n\n        tile.updateTile()\n    }\n\n    private val receiver = object : BroadcastReceiver() {\n        override fun onReceive(context: Context?, intent: Intent?) {\n            when (intent?.action) {\n                Intents.ACTION_CLASH_STARTED -\u003e {\n                    clashRunning = true\n\n                    currentProfile = \"\"\n                }\n                Intents.ACTION_CLASH_STOPPED, Intents.ACTION_SERVICE_RECREATED -\u003e {\n                    clashRunning = false\n\n                    currentProfile = \"\"\n                }\n                Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_LOADED -\u003e {\n                    currentProfile = StatusClient(this@TileService).currentProfile() ?: \"\"\n                }\n            }\n\n            updateTile()\n        }\n    }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "}\n\nfunc patchDns(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {\n\tif !cfg.DNS.Enable {\n\t\tcfg.DNS = config.DefaultRawConfig().DNS\n\t\tcfg.DNS.Enable = true\n\t\tcfg.DNS.NameServer = defaultNameServers\n\t\tcfg.DNS.EnhancedMode = C.DNSFakeIP\n\t\tcfg.DNS.FakeIPRange = defaultFakeIPRange\n\t\tcfg.DNS.FakeIPFilter = defaultFakeIPFilter\n\n\t\tcfg.ClashForAndroid.AppendSystemDNS = true\n\t}\n\n\tif cfg.ClashForAndroid.AppendSystemDNS {\n\t\tcfg.DNS.NameServer = append(cfg.DNS.NameServer, \"system://\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc patchTun(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {\n\tcfg.Tun.Enable = false\n\tcfg.Tun.AutoRoute = false\n\tcfg.Tun.AutoDetectInterface = false\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc patchListeners(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {\n\tnewListeners := make([]map[string]any, 0, len(cfg.Listeners))\n\tfor _, mapping := range cfg.Listeners {\n\t\tif proxyType, existType := mapping[\"type\"].(string); existType {\n\t\t\tswitch proxyType {\n\t\t\tcase \"tproxy\", \"redir\", \"tun\":\n\t\t\t\tcontinue // remove those listeners which is not supported\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tnewListeners = append(newListeners, mapping)\n\t}\n\tcfg.Listeners = newListeners\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc patchProviders(cfg *config.RawConfig, profileDir string) error {\n\tforEachProviders(cfg, func(index int, total int, key string, provider map[string]any, prefix string) {\n\t\tpath, _ := provider[\"path\"].(string)\n\t\tif len(path) \u003e 0 {\n\t\t\tpath = common.ResolveAsRoot(path)\n\t\t} else if url, ok := provider[\"url\"].(string); ok {\n\t\t\tpath = prefix + \"/\" + utils.MakeHash([]byte(url)).String() // same as C.GetPathByHash\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\treturn // both path and url are empty, maybe inline provider\n\t\t}\n\t\tprovider[\"path\"] = profileDir + \"/providers/\" + path\n\t})\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc validConfig(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func resolveMetadata(metadata *C.Metadata) (proxy C.Proxy, rule C.Rule, err error) {\n\tif metadata.SpecialProxy != \"\" {\n\t\tvar exist bool\n\t\tproxy, exist = proxies[metadata.SpecialProxy]\n\t\tif !exist {\n\t\t\terr = fmt.Errorf(\"proxy %s not found\", metadata.SpecialProxy)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tvar (\n\t\tresolved             bool\n\t\tattemptProcessLookup = metadata.Type != C.INNER\n\t)\n\n\tif node, ok := resolver.DefaultHosts.Search(metadata.Host, false); ok {\n\t\tmetadata.DstIP, _ = node.RandIP()\n\t\tresolved = true\n\t}\n\n\thelper := C.RuleMatchHelper{\n\t\tResolveIP: func() {\n\t\t\tif !resolved \u0026\u0026 metadata.Host != \"\" \u0026\u0026 !metadata.Resolved() {\n\t\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), resolver.DefaultDNSTimeout)\n\t\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\t\tip, err := resolver.ResolveIP(ctx, metadata.Host)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tlog.Debugln(\"[DNS] resolve %s error: %s\", metadata.Host, err.Error())\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tlog.Debugln(\"[DNS] %s --\u003e %s\", metadata.Host, ip.String())\n\t\t\t\t\tmetadata.DstIP = ip\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tresolved = true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t},\n\t\tFindProcess: func() {\n\t\t\tif attemptProcessLookup {\n\t\t\t\tattemptProcessLookup = false\n\t\t\t\tif !features.CMFA {\n\t\t\t\t\t// normal check for process\n\t\t\t\t\tuid, path, err := process.FindProcessName(metadata.NetWork.String(), metadata.SrcIP, int(metadata.SrcPort))\n\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlog.Debugln(\"[Process] find process error for %s: %v\", metadata.String(), err)\n\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetadata.Process = filepath.Base(path)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetadata.ProcessPath = path\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetadata.Uid = uid\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif pkg, err := process.FindPackageName(metadata); err == nil { // for android (not CMFA) package names\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmetadata.Process = pkg\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t// check package names\n\t\t\t\t\tpkg, err := process.FindPackageName(metadata)\n\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlog.Debugln(\"[Process] find process error for %s: %v\", metadata.String(), err)\n\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetadata.Process = pkg\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tswitch FindProcessMode() {\n\tcase process.FindProcessAlways:",

        "contents": "package config\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/dlclark/regexp2\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/common\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/config\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n)\n\nvar processors = []processor{\n\tpatchExternalController, // must before patchOverride, so we only apply ExternalController in Override settings\n\tpatchOverride,\n\tpatchGeneral,\n\tpatchProfile,\n\tpatchDns,\n\tpatchTun,\n\tpatchListeners,\n\tpatchProviders,\n\tvalidConfig,\n}\n\ntype processor func(cfg *config.RawConfig, profileDir string) error\n\nfunc patchOverride(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(ReadOverride(OverrideSlotPersist))).Decode(cfg); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Apply persist override: %s\", err.Error())\n\t}\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(ReadOverride(OverrideSlotSession))).Decode(cfg); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Apply session override: %s\", err.Error())\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc patchExternalController(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {\n\tcfg.ExternalController = \"\"\n\tcfg.ExternalControllerTLS = \"\"\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc patchGeneral(cfg *config.RawConfig, profileDir string) error {\n\tcfg.Interface = \"\"\n\tcfg.RoutingMark = 0\n\tif cfg.ExternalController != \"\" || cfg.ExternalControllerTLS != \"\" {\n\t\tcfg.ExternalUI = profileDir + \"/ui\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc patchProfile(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {\n\tcfg.Profile.StoreSelected = false\n\tcfg.Profile.StoreFakeIP = true\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc patchDns(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error",

        "contents": "object ProfileProcessor {\n    private val profileLock = Mutex()\n    private val processLock = Mutex()\n\n    suspend fun apply(context: Context, uuid: UUID, callback: IFetchObserver? = null) {\n        withContext(NonCancellable) {\n            processLock.withLock {\n                val snapshot = profileLock.withLock {\n                    val pending = PendingDao().queryByUUID(uuid)\n                        ?: throw IllegalArgumentException(\"profile $uuid not found\")\n\n                    pending.enforceFieldValid()\n\n                    context.processingDir.deleteRecursively()\n                    context.processingDir.mkdirs()\n\n                    context.pendingDir.resolve(pending.uuid.toString())\n                        .copyRecursively(context.processingDir, overwrite = true)\n\n                    pending\n                }\n\n                val force = snapshot.type != Profile.Type.File\n                var cb = callback\n\n                Clash.fetchAndValid(context.processingDir, snapshot.source, force) {\n                    try {\n                        cb?.updateStatus(it)\n                    } catch (e: Exception) {\n                        cb = null\n\n                        Log.w(\"Report fetch status: $e\", e)\n                    }\n                }.await()\n\n                profileLock.withLock {\n                    if (PendingDao().queryByUUID(snapshot.uuid) == snapshot) {\n                        ",

(\n\t\"encoding/base64\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/ech\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/transport/sudoku\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/transport/vless/encryption\"\n\n\t\"github.com/gofrs/uuid/v5\"\n)\n\nfunc Main(args []string) {\n\tif len(args) \u003c 1 {\n\t\tpanic(\"Using: generate uuid/reality-keypair/wg-keypair/ech-keypair/vless-mlkem768/vless-x25519/sudoku-keypair\")\n\t}\n\tswitch args[0] {\n\tcase \"uuid\":\n\t\tnewUUID, err := uuid.NewV4()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tpanic(err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tfmt.Println(newUUID.String())\n\tcase \"reality-keypair\":\n\t\tprivateKey, err := GenX25519PrivateKey()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tpanic(err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tfmt.Println(\"PrivateKey: \" + base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(privateKey.Bytes()))\n\t\tfmt.Println(\"PublicKey: \" + base64.RawURLEncoding.EncodeToString(privateKey.PublicKey().Bytes()))\n\tcase \"wg-keypair\":\n\t\tprivateKey, err := GenX25519PrivateKey()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tpanic(err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tfmt.Println(\"PrivateKey: \" + base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(privateKey.Bytes()))\n\t\tfmt.Println(\"PublicKey: \" + base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(privateKey.PublicKey().Bytes()))\n\tcase \"ech-keypair\":\n\t\tif len(args) \u003c 2 {\n\t\t\tpanic(\"Using: generate ech-keypair \u003cplain_server_name\u003e\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tconfigBase64, keyPem, err := ech.GenECHConfig(args[1])\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tpanic(err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tfmt.Println(\"Config:\", err := encryption.GenMLKEM768(seed)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tpanic(err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tfmt.Println(\"Seed: \" + seedBase64)\n\t\tfmt.Println(\"Client: \" + clientBase64)\n\t\tfmt.Println(\"Hash32: \" + hash32Base64)\n\tcase \"vless-x25519\":\n\t\tvar privateKey string\n\t\tif len(args) \u003e 1 {\n\t\t\tprivateKey = args[1]\n\t\t}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import java.util.*\n\nclass ProfileManager(private val context: Context) : IProfileManager,\n    CoroutineScope by CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO) {\n    private val store = ServiceStore(context)\n\n    init {\n        launch {\n            Database.database //.init\n\n            ProfileReceiver.rescheduleAll(context)\n        }\n    }\n\n    override suspend fun create(type: Profile.Type, name: String, source: String): UUID {\n        val uuid = generateProfileUUID()\n        val pending = Pending(\n            uuid = uuid,\n            name = name,\n            type = type,\n            source = source,\n            interval = 0,\n            upload = 0,\n            total = 0,\n            download = 0,\n            expire = 0,\n        )\n\n        PendingDao().insert(pending)\n\n        context.pendingDir.resolve(uuid.toString()).apply {\n            deleteRecursively()\n            mkdirs()\n\n            @Suppress(\"BlockingMethodInNonBlockingContext\")\n            resolve(\"config.yaml\").createNewFile()\n            resolve(\"providers\").mkdir()\n        }\n\n        return uuid\n    }\n\n    override suspend fun clone(uuid: UUID): UUID {\n        val newUUID = generateProfileUUID()\n\n        val imported = ImportedDao().queryByUUID(uuid)\n            ?: throw FileNotFoundException(\"profile $uuid not found\")\n\n        val pending = Pending(\n            uuid = newUUID,\n            name = imported.name,\n            type = Profile.Type.File,\n            source = imported.source,\n            interval = imported.interval,\n            upload = imported.upload,\n            total = imported.total,\n            download = imported.download,\n            expire = imported.expire,\n        )\n\n        cloneImportedFiles(uuid, newUUID)\n\n        PendingDao().insert(pending)\n\n        return newUUID\n    }\n\n    override suspend fun patch(uuid: UUID, name: String, source: String, interval: Long) {\n        val pending = PendingDao().queryByUUID(uuid)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.view.View\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.adapter.ProfileProviderAdapter\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.databinding.DesignNewProfileBinding\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.ProfileProvider\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.*\n\nclass NewProfileDesign(context: Context) : Design\u003cNewProfileDesign.Request\u003e(context) {\n    sealed class Request {\n        data class Create(val provider: ProfileProvider) : Request()\n        data class OpenDetail(val provider: ProfileProvider.External) : Request()\n        data class LaunchScanner(val provider: ProfileProvider.QR) : Request()\n    }\n\n    private val binding = DesignNewProfileBinding\n        .inflate(context.layoutInflater, context.root, false)\n    private val adapter = ProfileProviderAdapter(context, this::requestCreate, this::requestDetail)\n\n    override val root: View\n        get() = binding.root\n\n    suspend fun patchProviders(providers: List\u003cProfileProvider\u003e) {\n        adapter.apply {\n            patchDataSet(this::providers, providers)\n        }\n    }\n\n    init {\n        binding.self = this\n\n        binding.activityBarLayout.applyFrom(context)\n\n        binding.mainList.recyclerList.also {\n            it.bindAppBarElevation(binding.activityBarLayout)\n            it.applyLinearAdapter(context, adapter)\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun requestCreate(provider: ProfileProvider) {\n        if (provider is ProfileProvider.QR) {\n            requests.trySend(Request.LaunchScanner(provider))\n        } else {\n            requests.trySend(Request.Create(provider))\n        }\n\n    }\n\n    private fun requestDetail(provider: ProfileProvider): Boolean {\n        if (provider !is ProfileProvider.External) return false\n\n        requests.trySend(Request.OpenDetail(provider))\n\n        return true\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package delegate\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"syscall\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/process\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/app\"\n\t\"cfa/native/platform\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/dialer\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n)\n\nvar errBlocked = errors.New(\"blocked\")\n\nvar healthCheckNotifyFunc func(groupName string)\n\nfunc SetHealthCheckNotifyFunc(fn func(groupName string)) {\n\thealthCheckNotifyFunc = fn\n}\n\nfunc NotifyHealthCheckTriggered(groupName string) {\n\tif healthCheckNotifyFunc != nil {\n\t\thealthCheckNotifyFunc(groupName)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc Init(home, versionName, gitVersion string, platformVersion int) {\n\tlog.Infoln(\"Init core, home: %s, versionName: %s, gitVersion: %s, platformVersion: %d\", home, versionName, gitVersion, platformVersion)\n\tconstant.SetHomeDir(home)\n\t// gitVersion = ${CURRENT_BRANCH}_${COMMIT_HASH}_${COMPILE_TIME}\n\tif versions := strings.Split(gitVersion, \"_\"); len(versions) == 3 {\n\t\tconstant.Version = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s-%s-CMFA-%s\", strings.ToLower(versions[0]), versions[1], strings.ToLower(versionName))\n\t\tconstant.BuildTime = versions[2]\n\t} else {\n\t\tconstant.Version = gitVersion\n\t}\n\tconstant.Version = strings.ToLower(constant.Version)\n\tapp.ApplyVersionName(versionName)\n\tapp.ApplyPlatformVersion(platformVersion)\n\n\tprocess.DefaultPackageNameResolver = func(metadata *constant.Metadata) (string, error) {\n\t\tsrc, dst := metadata.RawSrcAddr, metadata.RawDstAddr\n\n\t\tif src == nil || dst == nil {\n\t\t\treturn \"\", process.ErrInvalidNetwork\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tuid := app.QuerySocketUid(metadata.RawSrcAddr, metadata.RawDstAddr)\n\t\tpkg := app.QueryAppByUid(uid)\n\n\t\tlog.Debugln(\"[PKG] %s --\u003e %s by %d[%s]\", metadata.SourceAddress(), metadata.RemoteAddress(), uid, pkg)\n\n\t\treturn pkg, nil\n\t}\n\n\tdialer.DefaultSocketHook = func(network, address string, conn syscall.RawConn) error {\n\t\tif platform.ShouldBlockConnection() {\n\t\t\treturn errBlocked\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn conn.Control(func(fd uintptr) {\n\t\t\tapp.MarkSocket(int(fd))\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (lb *LoadBalance) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\tvar all []string\n\tfor _, proxy := range lb.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tall = append(all, proxy.Name())\n\t}\n\treturn json.Marshal(map[string]any{\n\t\t\"type\":           lb.Type().String(),\n\t\t\"all\":            all,\n\t\t\"testUrl\":        lb.testUrl,\n\t\t\"expectedStatus\": lb.expectedStatus,\n\t\t\"hidden\":         lb.Hidden,\n\t\t\"icon\":           lb.Icon,\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc (lb *LoadBalance) Providers() []P.ProxyProvider {\n\treturn lb.providers\n}\n\nfunc (lb *LoadBalance) Proxies() []C.Proxy {\n\treturn lb.GetProxies(false)\n}\n\nfunc (lb *LoadBalance) Now() string {\n\treturn \"\"\n}\n\nfunc NewLoadBalance(option *GroupCommonOption, providers []P.ProxyProvider, strategy string) (lb *LoadBalance, err error) {\n\tvar strategyFn strategyFn\n\tswitch strategy {\n\tcase \"consistent-hashing\":\n\t\tstrategyFn = strategyConsistentHashing(option.URL)\n\tcase \"round-robin\":\n\t\tstrategyFn = strategyRoundRobin(option.URL)\n\tcase \"sticky-sessions\":\n\t\tstrategyFn = strategyStickySessions(option.URL)\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"%w: %s\", errStrategy, strategy)\n\t}\n\treturn \u0026LoadBalance{\n\t\tGroupBase: NewGroupBase(GroupBaseOption{\n\t\t\tName:                 option.Name,\n\t\t\tType:                 C.LoadBalance,\n\t\t\tFilter:               option.Filter,\n\t\t\tExcludeFilter:        option.ExcludeFilter,\n\t\t\tExcludeType:          option.ExcludeType,\n\t\t\tTestTimeout:          option.TestTimeout,\n\t\t\tFailureResetInterval: option.FailureResetInterval,\n\t\t\tMaxFailedTimes:       option.MaxFailedTimes,\n\t\t\tProviders:            providers,\n\t\t}),\n\t\tstrategyFn:     strategyFn,\n\t\tdisableUDP:     option.DisableUDP,\n\t\ttestUrl:        option.URL,\n\t\texpectedStatus: option.ExpectedStatus,\n\t\tHidden:         option.Hidden,\n\t\tIcon:           option.Icon,\n\t}, nil\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    override fun queryRoots(projection: Array\u003cout String\u003e?): Cursor {\n        val flags = Root.FLAG_LOCAL_ONLY or Root.FLAG_SUPPORTS_IS_CHILD\n\n        return MatrixCursor(projection ?: DEFAULT_ROOT_COLUMNS).apply {\n            newRow().apply {\n                add(Root.COLUMN_ROOT_ID, DEFAULT_ROOT_ID)\n                add(Root.COLUMN_FLAGS, flags)\n                add(Root.COLUMN_ICON, R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n                add(Root.COLUMN_TITLE, context!!.getString(R.string.clash_meta_for_android))\n                add(Root.COLUMN_SUMMARY, context!!.getString(R.string.profiles_and_providers))\n                add(Root.COLUMN_DOCUMENT_ID, \"/\")\n                add(Root.COLUMN_MIME_TYPES, D.MIME_TYPE_DIR)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun isChildDocument(parentDocumentId: String?, documentId: String?): Boolean {\n        if (parentDocumentId == null || documentId == null)\n            return false\n\n        return documentId.startsWith(parentDocumentId)\n    }\n\n    private fun MatrixCursor.RowBuilder.applyDocument(document: Document): MatrixCursor.RowBuilder {\n        var flags = 0\n\n        document.flags.forEach {\n            flags = when (it) {\n                Flag.Writable -\u003e flags or D.FLAG_SUPPORTS_WRITE\n                Flag.Deletable -\u003e flags or D.FLAG_SUPPORTS_DELETE\n                Flag.Virtual -\u003e flags or FLAG_VIRTUAL\n            }\n        }\n\n        add(D.COLUMN_DISPLAY_NAME, document.name)\n        add(D.COLUMN_MIME_TYPE, document.mimeType)\n        add(D.COLUMN_LAST_MODIFIED, document.updatedAt)\n        add(D.COLUMN_SIZE, document.size)\n        add(D.COLUMN_FLAGS, flags)\n\n        return this\n    }\n\n    private fun resolveDocumentProjection(projection: Array\u003cout String\u003e?): Array\u003cout String\u003e {\n        return projection ?: DEFAULT_DOCUMENT_COLUMNS\n    }\n\n    private val String.requestWrite: Boolean\n        get() {\n            return contains(\"w\", ignoreCase = true)\n        }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat\n\nimport android.app.ActivityThread\nimport android.app.Application\nimport android.graphics.drawable.AdaptiveIconDrawable\nimport android.graphics.drawable.Drawable\nimport android.os.Build\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.log.Log\n\nval Application.currentProcessName: String\n    get() {\n        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT \u003e= 28)\n            return Application.getProcessName()\n\n        return try {\n            ActivityThread.currentProcessName()\n        } catch (throwable: Throwable) {\n            Log.w(\"Resolve process name: $throwable\")\n\n            packageName\n        }\n    }\n\nfun Drawable.foreground(): Drawable {\n    if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT \u003e= Build.VERSION_CODES.O \u0026\u0026\n        this is AdaptiveIconDrawable \u0026\u0026 this.background == null\n    ) {\n        return this.foreground\n    }\n    return this\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    override suspend fun run() {\n        val broadcasts = receiveBroadcast {\n            addAction(Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_CHANGED)\n            addAction(Intents.ACTION_OVERRIDE_CHANGED)\n        }\n\n        var loaded: UUID? = null\n\n        reload.trySend(Unit)\n\n        while (true) {\n            val changed: UUID? = select {\n                broadcasts.onReceive {\n                    if (it.action == Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_CHANGED)\n                        UUID.fromString(it.getStringExtra(Intents.EXTRA_UUID))\n                    else\n                        null\n                }\n                reload.onReceive {\n                    null\n                }\n            }\n\n            try {\n                val current = store.activeProfile\n                    ?: throw NullPointerException(\"No profile selected\")\n\n                if (current == loaded \u0026\u0026 changed != null \u0026\u0026 changed != loaded)\n                    continue\n\n                loaded = current\n\n                val active = ImportedDao().queryByUUID(current)\n                    ?: throw NullPointerException(\"No profile selected\")\n\n                Clash.load(service.importedDir.resolve(active.uuid.toString())).await()\n\n                val remove = SelectionDao().querySelections(active.uuid)\n                    .filterNot { Clash.patchSelector(it.proxy, it.selected) }\n                    .map { it.proxy }\n\n                SelectionDao().removeSelections(active.uuid, remove)\n\n                StatusProvider.currentProfile = active.name\n\n                service.sendProfileLoaded(current)\n\n                Log.d(\"Profile ${active.name} loaded\")\n            } catch (e: Exception) {\n                return enqueueEvent(LoadException(e.message ?: \"Unknown\"))\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "## Clash Meta for Android\n\nA Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android\n\n### Feature\n\nFeature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)\n\n[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\"\n     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\"\n     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)\n\n### Requirement\n\n- Android 5.0+ (minimum)\n- Android 7.0+ (recommend)\n- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture\n\n### Build\n\n1. Update submodules\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   git submodule update --init --recursive\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**\n\n3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;.\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'\n   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash\n   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'\n   remove.suffix=true\n\n5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file\n   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e\n   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e\n   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. Build\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Automation\n\nAPP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;\n\n- Toggle Clash.Meta service status\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;\n- Start Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;\n- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "## Clash Meta for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "A Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "### Feature"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Feature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "### Requirement"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- Android 5.0+ (minimum)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- Android 7.0+ (recommend)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "### Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "1. Update submodules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "   git submodule update --init --recursive"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "   remove.suffix=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "6. Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "### Automation"
          },

            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit\n\nclass ProfileWorker : BaseService() {\n    private val service: ProfileWorker\n        get() = this\n\n    private val jobs = mutableListOf\u003cJob\u003e()\n\n    override fun onCreate() {\n        super.onCreate()\n\n        createChannels()\n\n        foreground()\n\n        launch {\n            delay(TimeUnit.SECONDS.toMillis(10))\n\n            while (true) {\n                jobs.removeFirstOrNull()?.join() ?: break\n            }\n\n            stopSelf()\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onDestroy() {\n        stopForeground(true)\n\n        super.onDestroy()\n    }\n\n    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {\n        super.onStartCommand(intent, flags, startId)\n\n        when (intent?.action) {\n            Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_REQUEST_UPDATE -\u003e {\n                intent.uuid?.also {\n                    val job = launch {\n                        run(it)\n                    }\n\n                    jobs.add(job)\n                }\n            }\n            Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_SCHEDULE_UPDATES -\u003e {\n                val job = launch {\n                    ProfileReceiver.rescheduleAll(service)\n\n                    delay(TimeUnit.SECONDS.toMillis(30))\n                }\n\n                jobs.add(job)\n            }\n        }\n\n        return START_NOT_STICKY\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun run(uuid: UUID) {\n        val imported = ImportedDao().queryByUUID(uuid) ?: return\n\n        try {\n            processing(imported.name) {\n                ProfileProcessor.update(this, imported.uuid, null)\n            }\n\n            completed(imported.uuid, imported.name)\n\n            ProfileReceiver.scheduleNext(this, imported)\n        } catch (e: Exception) {\n            failed(imported.uuid, imported.name, e.message ?: \"Unknown\")\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun createChannels() {\n        NotificationManagerCompat.from(this).createNotificationChannelsCompat(\n            ",

        "contents": " P.VehicleType {\n\treturn P.Inline\n}\n\nfunc (ip *inlineProvider) Update() error {\n\t// make api update happy\n\tip.updateAt = time.Now()\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc NewInlineProvider(name string, payload []map[string]any, parser resource.Parser[[]C.Proxy], hc *HealthCheck) (*InlineProvider, error) {\n\tps := ProxySchema{Proxies: payload}\n\tbuf, err := yaml.Marshal(ps)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tproxies, err := parser(buf)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\t// direct call setProxies on hc to avoid starting a health check process immediately, it should be done by Initial()\n\thc.setProxies(proxies)\n\n\tip := \u0026inlineProvider{\n\t\tbaseProvider: baseProvider{\n\t\t\tname:        name,\n\t\t\tproxies:     proxies,\n\t\t\thealthCheck: hc,\n\t\t},\n\t\tupdateAt: time.Now(),\n\t}\n\twrapper := \u0026InlineProvider{ip}\n\truntime.SetFinalizer(wrapper, (*InlineProvider).Close)\n\treturn wrapper, nil\n}\n\nfunc (ip *InlineProvider) Close() error {\n\truntime.SetFinalizer(ip, nil)\n\treturn ip.baseProvider.Close()\n}\n\n// CompatibleProvider for auto gc\ntype CompatibleProvider struct {\n\t*compatibleProvider\n}\n\ntype compatibleProvider struct {\n\tbaseProvider\n}\n\nfunc (cp *compatibleProvider) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\treturn json.Marshal(providerForApi{\n\t\tName:           cp.Name(),\n\t\tType:           cp.Type().String(),\n\t\tVehicleType:    cp.VehicleType().String(),\n\t\tProxies:        cp.Proxies(),\n\t\tTestUrl:        cp.healthCheck.url,\n\t\tExpectedStatus: cp.healthCheck.expectedStatus.String(),\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc (cp *compatibleProvider) Update() error {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (cp *compatibleProvider) VehicleType() P.VehicleType {\n\treturn P.Compatible\n}\n\nfunc NewCompatibleProvider",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "private var reason: String? = null\n\n    private val runtime = clashRuntime {\n        val store = ServiceStore(self)\n\n        val close = install(CloseModule(self))\n        val config = install(ConfigurationModule(self))\n        val network = install(NetworkObserveModule(self))\n\n        if (store.dynamicNotification)\n            install(DynamicNotificationModule(self))\n        else\n            install(StaticNotificationModule(self))\n\n        install(AppListCacheModule(self))\n        install(TimeZoneModule(self))\n        install(SuspendModule(self))\n        install(HealthCheckNotificationModule(self))\n\n        try {\n            while (isActive) {\n                val quit = select\u003cBoolean\u003e {\n                    close.onEvent {\n                        true\n                    }\n                    config.onEvent {\n                        reason = it.message\n\n                        true\n                    }\n                    network.onEvent {\n                        false\n                    }\n                }\n\n                if (quit) break\n            }\n        } catch (e: Exception) {\n            Log.e(\"Create clash runtime: ${e.message}\", e)\n\n            reason = e.message\n        } finally {\n            withContext(NonCancellable) {\n                stopSelf()\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onCreate() {\n        super.onCreate()\n\n        if (StatusProvider.serviceRunning)\n            return stopSelf()\n\n        StatusProvider.serviceRunning = true\n\n        StaticNotificationModule.createNotificationChannel(this)\n        StaticNotificationModule.notifyLoadingNotification(this)\n        HealthCheckNotificationModule.createNotificationChannel(this)\n\n        runtime.launch()\n    }\n\n    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {\n        sendClashStarted()\n\n        return START_STICKY\n    }\n\n    override fun onBind(intent: Intent?): IBinder {\n        return Binder()\n    }\n\n    override fun onDestroy() {\n        StatusProvider.serviceRunning = false\n\n        sendClashStopped(reason)",

已优化圆形图标，避免边缘被裁剪。

## 优化内容：

### 圆形图标优化
已为所有尺寸的圆形图标增加 20% 内边距（padding），确保在圆形遮罩内完整显示：

- **mipmap-mdpi** (48x48 px) - padding: 10px
- **mipmap-hdpi** (72x72 px) - padding: 14px  
- **mipmap-xhdpi** (96x96 px) - padding: 19px
- **mipmap-xxhdpi** (144x144 px) - padding: 29px
- **mipmap-xxxhdpi** (192x192 px) - padding: 38px

### 优化效果：
1. 缩小了火箭显示尺寸（约 60% 的画布空间）
2. 增加了四周内边距，确保关键部分在圆形区域内
3. 居中显示，避免边缘被裁剪
4. 保留透明背景，适配圆形遮罩

现在圆形图标在应用圆形遮罩时，火箭的尾翼和火焰等边缘部分应能完整显示，不会被裁剪。

如果还需要调整 padding 大小或位置，告诉我即可。

        "contents": "name: Build Release\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      release-tag:\n        description: 'Release Tag (v2.x.x)'\n        required: true\n\njobs:\n  BuildRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n        with:\n          fetch-depth: 0\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n      \n      - name: Convert and set version env\n        id: process-version\n        run: |\n          VERSION_TAG=${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n          VERSION_TAG=${VERSION_TAG#v}                              # remove the 'v' prefix\n          IFS='.' read -ra VERSION_PARTS \u003c\u003c\u003c \"$VERSION_TAG\"         # split into array\n          VERSION_CODE=$(printf \"%1d%02d%03d\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[0]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[1]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[2]}\")\n          \n          echo \"versonName=$VERSION_TAG\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT          # \"1.2.3\"\n          echo \"versonCode=$VERSION_CODE\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT         # \"102003\"\n      \n      # Re-write version in build.gradle.kts\n      - name: Re-write version\n        uses: Devofure/advance-android-version-actions@v1.5",

uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      # -         "contents": "@file:Suppress(\"UNUSED_VARIABLE\")\n\nimport com.android.build.gradle.AppExtension\nimport com.android.build.gradle.BaseExtension\nimport java.net.URL\nimport java.util.*\n\nbuildscript {\n    repositories {\n        mavenCentral()\n        google()\n        maven(\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MetaCubeX/maven-backup/main/releases\")\n    }\n    dependencies {\n        classpath(libs.build.android)\n        classpath(libs.build.kotlin.common)\n        classpath(libs.build.kotlin.serialization)\n        classpath(libs.build.ksp)\n        classpath(libs.build.golang)\n    }\n}\n\nsubprojects {\n    repositories {\n        mavenCentral()\n        google()\n        maven(\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MetaCubeX/maven-backup/main/releases\")\n    }\n\n    val isApp = name == \"app\"\n\n    apply(plugin = if (isApp) \"com.android.application\" else \"com.android.library\")\n\n    fun queryConfigProperty(key: String): Any? {\n        val localProperties = Properties()\n        val localPropertiesFile = rootProject.file(\"local.properties\")\n        if (localPropertiesFile.exists()) {\n            localProperties.load(localPropertiesFile.inputStream())\n        } else {\n            return null\n        }\n        return localProperties.getProperty(key)\n    }\n\n    extensions.configure\u003cBaseExtension\u003e {\n        buildFeatures.buildConfig = true\n        defaultConfig {\n            ",

        "contents": "        }\n\n        if (isApp) {\n            this as AppExtension\n\n            splits {\n                abi {\n                    isEnable = true\n                    isUniversalApk = false\n                    reset()\n                    include(\"arm64-v8a\")\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        compileOptions {\n            sourceCompatibility = JavaVersion.VERSION_21\n            targetCompatibility = JavaVersion.VERSION_21\n        }\n    }\n}\n\ntask(\"clean\", type = Delete::class) {\n    delete(rootProject.buildDir)\n}\n\ntasks.wrapper {\n    distributionType = Wrapper.DistributionType.ALL\n\n    doLast {\n        val sha256 = URL(\"$distributionUrl.sha256\").openStream()\n            .use { it.reader().readText().trim() }\n\n        file(\"gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties\")\n            .appendText(\"distributionSha256Sum=$sha256\")\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ".gradle\nbuild/\n/app/foss/release\n/app/premium/release\n/captures\n\n# Ignore Gradle GUI config\ngradle-app.setting\n\n# Avoid ignoring Gradle wrapper jar targetFile (.jar files are usually ignored)\n!gradle-wrapper.jar\n\n# Cache of project\n.gradletasknamecache\n\n# # Work around https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/IDEA-116898\n# gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties\n\n# Ignore IDEA config\n*.iml\n/.idea/*\n!/.idea/codeStyles\n/core/src/main/golang/.idea/*\n!/core/src/main/golang/.idea/codeStyles\n/core/src/foss/golang/.idea/*\n!/core/src/foss/golang/.idea/codeStyles\n/core/src/premium/golang/.idea/*\n!/core/src/premium/golang/.idea/codeStyles\n\n# Ignore builtin geofiles\napp/src/main/assets\n\n# KeyStore\nsigning.properties\n*.keystore\n*.jks\n\n# clion cmake build\ncmake-build-*\n\n# local.properties\nlocal.properties\n\n\n# tracker\ntracker.properties\n\n# vscode\n.vscode\n\n# cxx\n.cxx\n\n*.hprof\n\n# firebase\ngoogle-services.json\n\n# Dolphin\n.directory\n\n# logs\n*.log\n\n# MacOS\n.DS_Store",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "            }\n        }\n\n        signingConfigs {\n            val keystore = rootProject.file(\"signing.properties\")\n            if (keystore.exists()) {\n                create(\"release\") {\n                    val prop = Properties().apply {\n                        keystore.inputStream().use(this::load)\n                    }\n\n                    storeFile = rootProject.file(\"release.keystore\")\n                    storePassword = prop.getProperty(\"keystore.password\")!!\n                    keyAlias = prop.getProperty(\"key.alias\")!!\n                    keyPassword = prop.getProperty(\"key.password\")!!\n                }\n            }\n            // 如果没有signing.properties，release构建会使用debug签名配置\n            // 这样可以确保release构建始终使用相同的签名，避免签名不匹配的问题\n            // 注意：为了保持签名一致，建议始终使用相同的签名配置（要么都有signing.properties，要么都没有）\n        }\n\n        buildTypes {\n            named(\"release\") {\n                isMinifyEnabled = isApp\n                isShrinkResources = isApp\n                // 如果存在release签名配置就使用它，否则使用debug签名配置\n                // 这样可以确保即使没有signing.properties，release构建也使用一致的签名\n                signingConfig = signingConfigs.findByName(\"release\") ?: signingConfigs[\"debug\"]\n                proguardFiles(\n                    getDefaultProguardFile(\"proguard-android-optimize.txt\"),\n                    \"proguard-rules.pro\"\n                )\n            }\n            named(\"debug\") {\n                versionNameSuffix = \".debug\"\n            }\n        }\n\n        buildFeatures.apply {\n            dataBinding {\n                isEnabled = name != \"hideapi\"\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (isApp) {\n            this as AppExtension",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import android.databinding.tool.ext.capitalizeUS\nimport com.github.kr328.golang.GolangBuildTask\nimport com.github.kr328.golang.GolangPlugin\n\nplugins {\n    kotlin(\"android\")\n    id(\"com.android.library\")\n    id(\"kotlinx-serialization\")\n    id(\"golang-android\")\n}\n\nval golangSource = file(\"src/main/golang/native\")\n\ngolang {\n    sourceSets {\n        create(\"alpha\") {\n            tags.set(listOf(\"foss\",\"with_gvisor\",\"cmfa\"))\n            srcDir.set(file(\"src/foss/golang\"))\n        }\n        create(\"meta\") {\n            tags.set(listOf(\"foss\",\"with_gvisor\",\"cmfa\"))\n            srcDir.set(file(\"src/foss/golang\"))\n        }\n        all {\n            fileName.set(\"libclash.so\")\n            packageName.set(\"cfa/native\")\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nandroid {\n    productFlavors {\n        all {\n            externalNativeBuild {\n                cmake {\n                    arguments(\"-DGO_SOURCE:STRING=${golangSource}\")\n                    arguments(\"-DGO_OUTPUT:STRING=${GolangPlugin.outputDirOf(project, null, null)}\")\n                    arguments(\"-DFLAVOR_NAME:STRING=$name\")\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    externalNativeBuild {\n        cmake {\n            path = file(\"src/main/cpp/CMakeLists.txt\")\n        }\n    }\n}\n\ndependencies {\n    implementation(project(\":common\"))\n\n    implementation(libs.androidx.core)\n    implementation(libs.kotlin.coroutine)\n    implementation(libs.kotlin.serialization.json)\n}\n\nafterEvaluate {\n    tasks.withType(GolangBuildTask::class.java).forEach {\n        it.inputs.dir(golangSource)\n    }\n}\n\nval abis = listOf(\"arm64-v8a\" to \"Arm64V8a\")\n\nandroidComponents.onVariants { variant -\u003e\n    val cmakeName = if (variant.buildType == \"debug\") \"Debug\" else \"RelWithDebInfo\"",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    extensions.configure\u003cBaseExtension\u003e {\n        buildFeatures.buildConfig = true\n        defaultConfig {\n            if (isApp) {\n                val customApplicationId = queryConfigProperty(\"custom.application.id\") as? String?\n                applicationId = customApplicationId.takeIf { it?.isNotBlank() == true } ?: \"com.github.metacubex.clash\"\n            }\n\n            project.name.let { name -\u003e\n                namespace = if (name == \"app\") \"com.github.kr328.clash\"\n                else \"com.github.kr328.clash.$name\"\n            }\n\n            minSdk = 21\n            targetSdk = 35\n\n            versionName = \"2.11.22\"\n            versionCode = 211022\n\n            resValue(\"string\", \"release_name\", \"v$versionName\")\n            resValue(\"integer\", \"release_code\", \"$versionCode\")\n\n            externalNativeBuild {\n                cmake {\n                    abiFilters(\"arm64-v8a\")\n                }\n            }\n\n            if (!isApp) {\n                consumerProguardFiles(\"consumer-rules.pro\")\n            } else {\n                setProperty(\"archivesBaseName\", \"cmfa-$versionName\")\n            }\n        }\n\n        ndkVersion = \"27.2.12479018\"\n\n        compileSdkVersion(defaultConfig.targetSdk!!)\n\n        if (isApp) {\n            packagingOptions {\n                resources {\n                    excludes.add(\"DebugProbesKt.bin\")\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        productFlavors {\n            flavorDimensions(\"feature\")",

id(\"com.android.application\")\n}\n\ndependencies {\n    compileOnly(project(\":hideapi\"))\n\n    implementation(project(\":core\"))\n    implementation(project(\":service\"))\n    implementation(project(\":design\"))\n    implementation(project(\":common\"))\n\n    implementation(libs.kotlin.coroutine)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.core)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.activity)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.fragment)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.appcompat)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.coordinator)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.recyclerview)\n    implementation(libs.google.material)\n    implementation(libs.quickie.bundled)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.activity.ktx)\n}\n\ntasks.getByName(\"clean\", type = Delete::class) {\n    delete(file(\"release\"))\n}\n\nval geoFilesDownloadDir = \"src/main/assets\"\n\ntask(\"downloadGeoFiles\") {\n\n    val geoFilesUrls = mapOf(\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/geoip.metadb\" to -\u003e\n            val url = URL(downloadUrl)\n            val outputPath = file(\"$geoFilesDownloadDir/$outputFileName\")\n            outputPath.parentFile.mkdirs()\n            url.openStream().use { input -\u003e\n                Files.copy(input, outputPath.toPath(), StandardCopyOption.REPLACE_EXISTING)\n                println(\"$outputFileName downloaded to $outputPath\")\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nafterEvaluate {\n    val downloadGeoFilesTask = tasks[\"downloadGeoFiles\"]",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "androidComponents.onVariants { variant -\u003e\n    val cmakeName = if (variant.buildType == \"debug\") \"Debug\" else \"RelWithDebInfo\"\n\n    abis.forEach { (abi, goAbi) -\u003e\n        tasks.configureEach {\n            if (name.startsWith(\"buildCMake$cmakeName[$abi]\")) {\n                dependsOn(\"externalGolangBuild${variant.name.capitalizeUS()}$goAbi\")\n                println(\"Set up dependency: $name -\u003e externalGolangBuild${variant.name.capitalizeUS()}$goAbi\")\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}",
