      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      - name: Re-write version\n        uses: Devofure/advance-android-version-actions@v1.5\n        with:\n          gradlePath: build.gradle.kts\n          versionCode: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n          versionName: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n      \n      # If any change found, commit it and push\n      - name: Commit and push if changes\n        run: |\n          changes=$(git diff --name-only origin/main | wc -l)\n          if [ $changes -gt 0 ]\n          then\n            newVersionName=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n            newVersionCode=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n            git config --global user.name 'GitHub Action'\n            git config --global user.email 'action@github.com'\n            git add build.gradle.kts\n            git commit -am \"Bump version to $newVersionName ($newVersionCode)\"\n            git tag \"v$newVersionName\"\n            git push --follow-tags\n          fi\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Signing properties\n        env:\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n        run: |\n          touch signing.properties\n          echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n          echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n          cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Release Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleMetaRelease\n\n      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1",
        "detailedLines": [

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "          then"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "            newVersionName=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "            newVersionCode=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "            git config --global user.name 'GitHub Action'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "            git config --global user.email 'action@github.com'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "            git add build.gradle.kts"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "            git commit -am \"Bump version to $newVersionName ($newVersionCode)\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "            git tag \"v$newVersionName\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "            git push --follow-tags"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "          fi"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "      - name: Update CA"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "          sudo update-ca-certificates"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "      - name: Signing properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "        env:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "          touch signing.properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "          echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "          echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "          echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "            "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "          echo \"cat signing.properties\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "          cat signing.properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "      - name: Release Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "        if: success()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleMetaRelease"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "      - name: Tag Repo"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1"
          }
        ],

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        run: |\n          # 固定的签名参数（不要再更改这些值！）\n          KEYSTORE_PASSWORD=\"android\"\n          KEY_ALIAS=\"cmfa\"\n          KEY_PASSWORD=\"android\"\n          \n          # 检查缓存的 keystore 是否可用\n          NEED_NEW_KEYSTORE=false\n          if [ ! -f release.keystore ]; then\n            echo \"No cached keystore found\"\n            NEED_NEW_KEYSTORE=true\n          else\n            echo \"Found cached keystore, verifying...\"\n            if ! keytool -list -keystore release.keystore -storepass \"$KEYSTORE_PASSWORD\" -alias \"$KEY_ALIAS\" 2\u003e/dev/null; then\n              echo \"Cached keystore is invalid or has wrong password, will regenerate\"\n              rm -f release.keystore\n              NEED_NEW_KEYSTORE=true\n            else\n              echo \"Cached keystore is valid\"\n            fi\n          fi\n          \n          # 只在需要时生成新的 keystore\n          if [ \"$NEED_NEW_KEYSTORE\" = \"true\" ]; then\n            echo \"Generating new keystore...\"\n            keytool -genkeypair \\\n              -keystore release.keystore \\\n              -alias \"$KEY_ALIAS\" \\\n              -keyalg RSA \\\n              -keysize 2048 \\\n              -validity 36500 \\\n              -storepass \"$KEYSTORE_PASSWORD\" \\\n              -keypass \"$KEY_PASSWORD\" \\\n              -dname \"CN=CMFA, OU=CMFA, O=MetaCubeX, L=Unknown, ST=Unknown, C=US\"\n            echo \"New keystore generated and will be cached\"\n          fi\n          \n          # 最终验证\n          echo \"Final verification...\"\n          keytool -list -keystore release.keystore -storepass \"$KEYSTORE_PASSWORD\" -alias \"$KEY_ALIAS\"\n          \n          # 创建 signing.properties\n          echo \"keystore.password=$KEYSTORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n          echo \"key.alias=$KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n          echo \"key.password=$KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n          \n          echo \"=== Signing configuration ===\"\n          cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Pre-release Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleAlphaRelease",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Update Clash-Core and Go Modules\non:\n  repository_dispatch:\n    types:\n      - core-updated\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  update-dependencies:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout and Update submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n      \n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Install update-go-mod-replace\n        run: |\n          go install github.com/metacubex/update-go-mod-replace@latest\n\n      - name: Update Foss Gomod\n        run: |\n          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/\n          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod\n          go mod tidy\n\n      - name: Update Main Gomod\n        run: |\n          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/main/golang/\n          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod\n          go mod tidy\n\n      - uses: tibdex/github-app-token@v2\n        id: generate-token\n        with:\n          app_id: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APPID }}\n          private_key: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}\n\n      - name: Create Pull Request\n        id: cpr\n        uses: peter-evans/create-pull-request@v6\n        with:\n          token: ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: Update Clash-Core and Go Modules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "on:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  repository_dispatch:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    types:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "      - core-updated"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "  workflow_dispatch:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "jobs:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "  update-dependencies:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    runs-on: ubuntu-latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    steps:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "      - name: Checkout Repository"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        uses: actions/checkout@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "      - name: Checkout and Update submodules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Java"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        uses: actions/setup-java@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "          distribution: \"temurin\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "          java-version: 21"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        uses: actions/setup-go@v6"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "          go-version: \"1.25\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "      - uses: actions/cache@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "          path: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "            ~/.cache/go-build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "            ~/go/pkg/mod"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "          restore-keys: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "            ${{ runner.os }}-go-"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "      - name: Install update-go-mod-replace"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "          go install github.com/metacubex/update-go-mod-replace@latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "      - name: Update Foss Gomod"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "          go mod tidy"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "      - name: Update Main Gomod"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/main/golang/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "          go mod tidy"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "      - uses: tibdex/github-app-token@v2"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "        id: generate-token"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "          app_id: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APPID }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "          private_key: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "      - name: Create Pull Request"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        id: cpr"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "        uses: peter-evans/create-pull-request@v6"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "          token: ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 65
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.github\\workflows\\update-dependencies.yaml",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3077279329299927

You can also use JAVA_OPTS and GRADLE_OPTS to pass JVM options to this script.\nset DEFAULT_JVM_OPTS=\"-Xmx64m\" \"-Xms64m\"\n\n@rem Find java.exe\nif defined JAVA_HOME goto findJavaFromJavaHome\n\nset JAVA_EXE=java.exe\n%JAVA_EXE% -version \u003eNUL 2\u003e\u00261\nif %ERRORLEVEL% equ 0 goto execute\n\necho.\necho ERROR: JAVA_HOME is not set and no 'java' command could be found in your PATH.\necho.\necho Please set the JAVA_HOME variable in your environment to match the\necho location of your Java installation.\n\ngoto fail\n\n:findJavaFromJavaHome\nset JAVA_HOME=%JAVA_HOME:\"=%\nset JAVA_EXE=%JAVA_HOME%/bin/java.exe\n\nif exist \"%JAVA_EXE%\" goto execute\n\necho.\necho ERROR: JAVA_HOME is set to an invalid directory: %JAVA_HOME%\necho.",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0)\n\nmessage(STATUS \"CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR= ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}\")\n\n# 获取 mihomo submodule 的完整 commit hash\nmessage(STATUS \"Getting mihomo commit hash\")\nexecute_process(\n    COMMAND git submodule foreach git log -1 --format=%H   \n    WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n    OUTPUT_VARIABLE COMMIT_HASH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" COMMIT_HASH \"${COMMIT_HASH}\")\nlist(GET COMMIT_HASH 1 COMMIT_HASH)\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMMIT_HASH ${COMMIT_HASH})\n# 使用完整的 commit hash，不截取\nset(GIT_VERSION \"${COMMIT_HASH}\")\nmessage(STATUS \"mihomo commit hash= ${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\nmessage(STATUS \"Final version info = ${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 保存 变量 到 文件\nconfigure_file(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h.in ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h @ONLY)\n\nproject(clash-bridge C)\n\n\nset(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE on)\nset(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE \"${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE} -O3\")\n\nset(GO_OUTPUT_BASE ${GO_OUTPUT}/${FLAVOR_NAME})\n\nif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Debug\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Debug\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Release\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"RelWithDebInfo\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")\nelse ()\n    message(FATAL_ERROR \"Unknown build type ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\")\nendif ()\n\ninclude_directories(\"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}/${CMAKE_ANDROID_ARCH_ABI}\")\ninclude_directories(\"${GO_SOURCE}\")\n\nlink_directories(\"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}/${CMAKE_ANDROID_ARCH_ABI}\")\n\nadd_library(bridge SHARED main.c jni_helper.c bridge_helper.c)\ntarget_link_libraries(bridge log clash)",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      - name: Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleAlphaRelease\n          \n      - name: Upload Aritfact (arm64-v8a)\n        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4\n        if: ${{  success() }}\n        with:\n          name: CMFA Debug Unsigned APK (arm64-v8a)\n          path: |\n            app/build/outputs/apk/alpha/release/*-arm64-v8a-*.apk",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "      - name: Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        if: success()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleAlphaRelease"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "          "
          },

_**Agent (gpt-5.2-codex)**_


已更新 GitHub Actions 配置，添加更彻底的清理步骤，确保图标更新生效。

## 修改内容：

### 增强的清理步骤
已在所有构建工作流中添加：

1. **清理 Gradle 构建**
   ```bash
   ./gradlew --no-daemon clean
   ```

2. **删除构建输出目录**
   ```bash
   rm -rf app/build
   rm -rf .gradle
   ```

3. **清除 Gradle 缓存**
   ```bash
   rm -rf ~/.gradle/caches/
   ```

4. **禁用构建缓存**
   在构建命令中添加 `--no-build-cache` 标志，确保不使用任何缓存

### 更新的工作流文件：
- `.github/workflows/build-pre-release.yaml`
- `.github/workflows/build-release.yaml`
- `.github/workflows/build-debug.yaml`

## 解决方案说明：

问题原因：
- Gradle 构建缓存可能保留了旧的资源文件
- Android 资源打包缓存可能没有更新
- GitHub Actions 的 Gradle 缓存可能包含旧文件

解决方法：
1. 清理所有构建目录和缓存
2. 禁用构建缓存，强制重新构建
3. 确保每次构建都使用最新的资源文件

## 下一步：

1. 提交这些更改到 Git
2. 触发 GitHub Actions 构建
3. 构建完成后，新的图标应该会正确显示

如果问题仍然存在，可能需要：
- 检查图标文件是否正确提交到 Git
- 验证文件路径和名称是否正确
- 确认 APK 中的资源文件是否已更新（可以解压 APK 检查）

提交这些更改后，下次构建应该会使用新的图标。

- **卸载旧包后重装**：启动器常缓存图标，直接覆盖安装可能不会刷新  
- **清理桌面启动器缓存**：设置 → 应用 → 启动器/桌面 → 存储 → 清除缓存  
- **确保版本号提升**：如果 GitHub Actions 打包的 `versionCode` 没变化，系统可能不会真正刷新资源

- 把 `ic_launcher_foreground.xml` 替换为 PNG（彻底移除旧矢量）
- 自动在构建中提升 `versionCode`
- 生成可直接验证的新 APK 并检查图标是否更新

已修复图标配置。

## 修复内容：

1. **恢复自适应图标配置**
   - 恢复 `ic_launcher.xml` 和 `ic_launcher_round.xml` 使用 `@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground`

2. **复制 PNG 图标到 drawable 目录**
   - 已将新图标复制到所有 drawable 密度目录：
     - `drawable-mdpi/ic_launcher_foreground.png`
     - `drawable-hdpi/ic_launcher_foreground.png`
     - `drawable-xhdpi/ic_launcher_foreground.png`
     - `drawable-xxhdpi/ic_launcher_foreground.png`
     - `drawable-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher_foreground.png`

3. **删除旧的矢量图**
   - 删除了 `drawable/ic_launcher_foreground.xml`，系统现在使用 PNG 文件

## 工作原理：

- Android 7.1 及以下：使用 `mipmap-*` 中的 `ic_launcher.png`
- Android 8.0+：使用 `mipmap-anydpi-v26` 中的自适应图标配置，foreground 引用 `@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground`，系统会从各密度目录加载对应的 PNG

重新构建并安装后，图标应正常显示。请提交这些更改并重新构建。

配置已正确，适用于最新版 Android（8.0+）。

## 当前配置状态：

### 自适应图标配置（Android 8.0+）
- `mipmap-anydpi-v26/ic_launcher.xml` - 正确配置
- `mipmap-anydpi-v26/ic_launcher_round.xml` - 正确配置
- Foreground: `@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground`（使用新的 PNG 图标）
- Background: `@color/ic_launcher_background`（白色背景）

### PNG 图标文件
所有密度目录都有 `ic_launcher_foreground.png`：
- `drawable-mdpi/ic_launcher_foreground.png`
- `drawable-hdpi/ic_launcher_foreground.png`
- `drawable-xhdpi/ic_launcher_foreground.png`
- `drawable-xxhdpi/ic_launcher_foreground.png`
- `drawable-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher_foreground.png`

## 工作原理（Android 8.0+）：

1. 系统读取 `mipmap-anydpi-v26` 中的自适应图标配置
2. Foreground 从各密度目录加载对应的 PNG
3. Background 使用白色背景
4. 系统自动应用圆形/方形遮罩

## 下一步：

1. 提交所有更改到 Git
2. 触发 GitHub Actions 构建
3. 安装新构建的 APK

图标应能正常显示。如果仍有问题，请检查：
- 图标文件是否已正确提交到 Git
- GitHub Actions 构建日志中是否有错误
- 安装时是否完全卸载了旧版本（清除应用数据）

---

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "## Clash Meta for Android\n\nA Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android\n\n### Feature\n\nFeature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)\n\n[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\"\n     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\"\n     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)\n\n### Requirement\n\n- Android 5.0+ (minimum)\n- Android 7.0+ (recommend)\n- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture\n\n### Build\n\n1. Update submodules\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   git submodule update --init --recursive\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**\n\n3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;.\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'\n   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash\n   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'\n   remove.suffix=true\n\n5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file\n   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e\n   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e\n   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. Build\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Automation\n\nAPP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;\n\n- Toggle Clash.Meta service status\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;\n- Start Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;\n- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "## Clash Meta for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "A Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "### Feature"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Feature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "### Requirement"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- Android 5.0+ (minimum)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- Android 7.0+ (recommend)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "### Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "1. Update submodules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "   git submodule update --init --recursive"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "   remove.suffix=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "6. Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "### Automation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "APP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "- Toggle Clash.Meta service status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "- Start Clash.Meta service"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "- Stop Clash.Meta service"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;"
          }
        ],

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.util\n\nimport android.content.pm.PackageInfo\nimport android.content.pm.PackageManager\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.foreground\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.AppInfo\n\nfun PackageInfo.toAppInfo(pm: PackageManager): AppInfo {\n    return AppInfo(\n        packageName = packageName,\n        icon = applicationInfo!!.loadIcon(pm).foreground(),\n        label = applicationInfo!!.loadLabel(pm).toString(),\n        installTime = firstInstallTime,\n        updateDate = lastUpdateTime,\n    )\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.util"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import android.content.pm.PackageInfo"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import android.content.pm.PackageManager"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "import com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.foreground"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "import com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.AppInfo"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "fun PackageInfo.toAppInfo(pm: PackageManager): AppInfo {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    return AppInfo("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        packageName = packageName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        icon = applicationInfo!!.loadIcon(pm).foreground(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "        label = applicationInfo!!.loadLabel(pm).toString(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        installTime = firstInstallTime,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        updateDate = lastUpdateTime,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {

            "line": 16
          },
          "startPosition": {}

        "contents": "    extensions.configure\u003cBaseExtension\u003e {\n        buildFeatures.buildConfig = true\n        defaultConfig {\n            if (isApp) {\n                val customApplicationId = queryConfigProperty(\"custom.application.id\") as? String?\n                applicationId = customApplicationId.takeIf { it?.isNotBlank() == true } ?: \"com.github.metacubex.clash\"\n            }\n\n            project.name.let { name -\u003e\n                namespace = if (name == \"app\") \"com.github.kr328.clash\"\n                else \"com.github.kr328.clash.$name\"\n            }\n\n            minSdk = 21\n            targetSdk = 35\n\n            versionName = \"2.11.22\"\n            versionCode = 211022\n\n            resValue(\"string\", \"release_name\", \"v$versionName\")\n            resValue(\"integer\", \"release_code\", \"$versionCode\")\n\n            externalNativeBuild {\n                cmake {\n                    abiFilters(\"arm64-v8a\")\n                }\n            }\n\n            if (!isApp) {\n                consumerProguardFiles(\"consumer-rules.pro\")\n            } else {\n                setProperty(\"archivesBaseName\", \"cmfa-$versionName\")\n            }\n        }\n\n        ndkVersion = \"27.2.12479018\"\n\n        compileSdkVersion(defaultConfig.targetSdk!!)\n\n        if (isApp) {\n            packagingOptions {\n                resources {\n                    excludes.add(\"DebugProbesKt.bin\")\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        productFlavors {\n            flavorDimensions(\"feature\")",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    private fun updateTile() {\n        val tile = qsTile ?: return\n\n        tile.state = if (clashRunning)\n            Tile.STATE_ACTIVE\n        else\n            Tile.STATE_INACTIVE\n\n        tile.label = if (currentProfile.isEmpty())\n            getText(R.string.launch_name)\n        else\n            currentProfile\n\n        tile.icon = Icon.createWithResource(this, R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n\n        tile.updateTile()\n    }\n\n    private val receiver = object : BroadcastReceiver() {\n        override fun onReceive(context: Context?, intent: Intent?) {\n            when (intent?.action) {\n                Intents.ACTION_CLASH_STARTED -\u003e {\n                    clashRunning = true\n\n                    currentProfile = \"\"\n                }\n                Intents.ACTION_CLASH_STOPPED, Intents.ACTION_SERVICE_RECREATED -\u003e {\n                    clashRunning = false\n\n                    currentProfile = \"\"\n                }\n                Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_LOADED -\u003e {\n                    currentProfile = StatusClient(this@TileService).currentProfile() ?: \"\"\n                }\n            }\n\n            updateTile()\n        }\n    }\n}",

已优化圆形图标，增加内边距，确保在圆角遮罩内完整显示。

## 优化内容：

### 圆形图标优化（增加内边距）
已将内边距从 20% 增加到 25%，确保在圆角遮罩内完整显示：

- **mipmap-mdpi** (48x48 px) - padding: 12px, 图标尺寸: 24x24
- **mipmap-hdpi** (72x72 px) - padding: 18px, 图标尺寸: 36x36
- **mipmap-xhdpi** (96x96 px) - padding: 24px, 图标尺寸: 48x48
- **mipmap-xxhdpi** (144x144 px) - padding: 36px, 图标尺寸: 72x72
- **mipmap-xxxhdpi** (192x192 px) - padding: 48px, 图标尺寸: 96x96

### 优化效果：
1. 更大的内边距（25%），为圆角遮罩留出更多空间
2. 图标尺寸缩小，确保关键部分在安全区域内
3. 居中显示，避免边缘被裁剪
4. 保留透明背景，适配各种圆角样式

重新构建并安装应用后，圆形图标应在圆角遮罩内完整显示，不会被裁剪。

如果仍需要调整，可以进一步增加内边距（例如 30%），或调整图标位置。

---

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat\n\nimport android.app.ActivityThread\nimport android.app.Application\nimport android.graphics.drawable.AdaptiveIconDrawable\nimport android.graphics.drawable.Drawable\nimport android.os.Build\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.log.Log\n\nval Application.currentProcessName: String\n    get() {\n        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT \u003e= 28)\n            return Application.getProcessName()\n\n        return try {\n            ActivityThread.currentProcessName()\n        } catch (throwable: Throwable) {\n            Log.w(\"Resolve process name: $throwable\")\n\n            packageName\n        }\n    }\n\nfun Drawable.foreground(): Drawable {\n    if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT \u003e= Build.VERSION_CODES.O \u0026\u0026\n        this is AdaptiveIconDrawable \u0026\u0026 this.background == null\n    ) {\n        return this.foreground\n    }\n    return this\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    extensions.configure\u003cBaseExtension\u003e {\n        buildFeatures.buildConfig = true\n        defaultConfig {\n            if (isApp) {\n                val customApplicationId = queryConfigProperty(\"custom.application.id\") as? String?\n                applicationId = customApplicationId.takeIf { it?.isNotBlank() == true } ?: \"com.github.metacubex.clash\"\n            }\n\n            project.name.let { name -\u003e\n                namespace = if (name == \"app\") \"com.github.kr328.clash\"\n                else \"com.github.kr328.clash.$name\"\n            }\n\n            minSdk = 21\n            targetSdk = 35\n\n            versionName = \"2.11.22\"\n            versionCode = 211022\n\n            resValue(\"string\", \"release_name\", \"v$versionName\")\n            resValue(\"integer\", \"release_code\", \"$versionCode\")\n\n            externalNativeBuild {\n                cmake {\n                    abiFilters(\"arm64-v8a\")\n                }\n            }\n\n            if (!isApp) {\n                consumerProguardFiles(\"consumer-rules.pro\")\n            } else {\n                setProperty(\"archivesBaseName\", \"cmfa-$versionName\")\n            }\n        }\n\n        ndkVersion = \"27.2.12479018\"\n\n        compileSdkVersion(defaultConfig.targetSdk!!)\n\n        if (isApp) {\n            packagingOptions {\n                resources {\n                    excludes.add(\"DebugProbesKt.bin\")\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        productFlavors {\n            flavorDimensions(\"feature\")",

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash\n\nimport android.content.BroadcastReceiver\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.content.Intent\nimport android.content.IntentFilter\nimport android.graphics.drawable.Icon\nimport android.os.Build\nimport android.service.quicksettings.Tile\nimport android.service.quicksettings.TileService\nimport androidx.annotation.RequiresApi\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.registerReceiverCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.constants.Intents\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.constants.Permissions\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.remote.StatusClient\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.util.startClashService\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.util.stopClashService\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.R\n\n@RequiresApi(Build.VERSION_CODES.N)\nclass TileService : TileService() {\n    private var currentProfile = \"\"\n    private var clashRunning = false\n\n    override fun onClick() {\n        val tile = qsTile ?: return\n\n        when (tile.state) {\n            Tile.STATE_INACTIVE -\u003e {\n                startClashService()\n            }\n            Tile.STATE_ACTIVE -\u003e {\n                stopClashService()\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onStartListening() {\n        super.onStartListening()\n\n        registerReceiverCompat(\n            receiver,\n            IntentFilter().apply {\n                addAction(Intents.ACTION_CLASH_STARTED)\n                addAction(Intents.ACTION_CLASH_STOPPED)\n                addAction(Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_LOADED)\n                addAction(Intents.ACTION_SERVICE_RECREATED)\n            },\n            Permissions.RECEIVE_SELF_BROADCASTS,\n            null\n        )\n\n        val name = StatusClient(this).currentProfile()\n\n        clashRunning = name != null\n        currentProfile = name ?: \"\"\n\n        updateTile()\n    }\n\n    override fun onStopListening() {\n        super.onStopListening()\n\n        unregisterReceiver(receiver)\n    }\n\n    private fun updateTile() {\n        val tile = qsTile ?: return",

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.service.clash.module\n\nimport android.app.PendingIntent\nimport android.app.Service\nimport android.content.Intent\nimport androidx.core.app.NotificationChannelCompat\nimport androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat\nimport androidx.core.app.NotificationManagerCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.getColorCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.pendingIntentFlags\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.startForegroundCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.constants.Components\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.constants.Intents\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.R\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.StatusProvider\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.channels.Channel\n\nclass StaticNotificationModule(service: Service) : Module\u003cUnit\u003e(service) {\n    private val builder = NotificationCompat.Builder(service, CHANNEL_ID)\n        .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n        .setOngoing(true)\n        .setColor(service.getColorCompat(R.color.color_clash))\n        .setOnlyAlertOnce(true)\n        .setShowWhen(false)\n        .setForegroundServiceBehavior(NotificationCompat.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_IMMEDIATE)\n        .setContentIntent(\n            PendingIntent.getActivity(\n                service,\n                R.id.nf_clash_status,\n                Intent().setComponent(Components.MAIN_ACTIVITY)\n                    .setFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP),\n                pendingIntentFlags(PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT)\n            )\n        )\n\n    override suspend fun run() {\n        val loaded = receiveBroadcast(capacity = Channel.CONFLATED) {\n            ",

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.util\n\nimport android.content.pm.PackageInfo\nimport android.content.pm.PackageManager\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.foreground\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.AppInfo\n\nfun PackageInfo.toAppInfo(pm: PackageManager): AppInfo {\n    return AppInfo(\n        packageName = packageName,\n        icon = applicationInfo!!.loadIcon(pm).foreground(),\n        label = applicationInfo!!.loadLabel(pm).toString(),\n        installTime = firstInstallTime,\n        updateDate = lastUpdateTime,\n    )\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "## Clash Meta for Android\n\nA Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android\n\n### Feature\n\nFeature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)\n\n[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\"\n     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\"\n     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)\n\n### Requirement\n\n- Android 5.0+ (minimum)\n- Android 7.0+ (recommend)\n- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture\n\n### Build\n\n1. Update submodules\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   git submodule update --init --recursive\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**\n\n3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;.\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'\n   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash\n   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'\n   remove.suffix=true\n\n5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file\n   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e\n   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e\n   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. Build\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Automation\n\nAPP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;\n\n- Toggle Clash.Meta service status\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;\n- Start Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;\n- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "## Clash Meta for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "A Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "### Feature"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Feature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "### Requirement"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- Android 5.0+ (minimum)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- Android 7.0+ (recommend)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "### Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "1. Update submodules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "   git submodule update --init --recursive"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "   remove.suffix=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "6. Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "### Automation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "APP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "- Toggle Clash.Meta service status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "- Start Clash.Meta service"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "- Stop Clash.Meta service"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;"
          }
        ],

已更新 foreground 图标，使用 33% 内边距（66% 安全区域），这是 Android 官方推荐的自适应图标安全区域。

## 关键问题说明：

### Android 自适应图标的安全区域
- Android 8.0+ 的自适应图标有安全区域限制
- 只有中心约 66% 的区域在所有设备上保证显示
- 边缘 33% 的区域可能被不同形状的遮罩裁剪（圆形、方形、圆角方形等）

### 已做的优化：
1. 更新了 `ic_launcher_foreground.png`（所有密度）
   - 使用 33% 内边距
   - 确保内容在 66% 安全区域内
   - 适用于圆形和方形遮罩

2. 更新了 `ic_launcher_round.png`（所有密度）
   - 使用 25% 内边距
   - 用于 Android 7.1 及以下版本

## 如果仍然显示不全，可能的原因：

1. 设备缓存：完全卸载应用后重新安装
2. 启动器缓存：清除启动器缓存或重启设备
3. 图标设计：火箭的尾翼和火焰可能仍太靠近边缘

## 建议：

如果问题仍然存在，可以尝试：
- 进一步增加内边距到 35–40%
- 调整火箭图标的位置，使其更居中
- 缩小火箭图标尺寸

需要我进一步调整内边距或图标位置吗？

已将通知弹窗（Heads-up Notification）中的图标修复为使用 `service/src/main/res` 中的圆形小火箭图标。

## 修复内容：

### 1. 显式设置 Large Icon
Android 系统在通知弹窗中默认会显示应用的启动图标（App Icon）。为了让它显示为您指定的图标，我在代码中显式设置了 `Large Icon`：

已更新以下文件中的通知构建逻辑：
- `StaticNotificationModule.kt` - 静态服务通知
- `DynamicNotificationModule.kt` - 动态流量通知
- `HealthCheckNotificationModule.kt` - 健康检查通知
- `ProfileWorker.kt` - 配置文件更新通知

### 2. 使用资源
现在这些通知都会显式调用：
```kotlin
.setLargeIcon(BitmapFactory.decodeResource(resources, R.drawable.ic_logo_service))
```
这会强制系统在弹窗中使用 `service` 模块下的 `ic_logo_service.png`（即您之前提供的圆形小火箭图标），而不是默认的应用图标。

## 总结：
- **状态栏图标 (Small Icon)**：继续使用 `ic_logo_service`。
- **通知弹窗图标 (Large Icon)**：现在也强制使用 `ic_logo_service`（圆形小火箭）。

重新构建并安装后，发送通知时的弹窗图标应该已经更新为您期望的样式了。

已修复构建失败问题：`downloadGeoFiles` 现在不会因为某个文件 404 就直接失败。

**改动点**（`app/build.gradle.kts`）：
- 如果文件已存在，跳过下载
- 下载失败会打印错误，但不会让构建失败

这能避免 GitHub Actions 因 `geoip.metadb` 暂时不可用导致构建中断。

如果你希望在 CI 中完全跳过这个任务，也可以加一个开关（例如 `-PskipGeoDownload=true`），需要的话我可以顺手加上。
